items.title: ‘Is Rayan Cherki OK?’ – Fans in stitches at France’s World Cup squad photo thanks to Premier League star’s awkward pose
items.summary: RAYAN CHERKI had fans cracking up after he struck a bizarre pose during a France squad photo. The Manchester City man is part of the France team hoping to bring World Cup glory back to Europe in the coming weeks. And though there were always going to be speed bumps on the way, nobody expected...

items.title: Rozicki fires warning to Billam-Smith: You can't get hit against me!
items.summary: Ryan Rozicki is coming to hurt Chris Billam-Smith. It's not personal. It's simply his craft.

items.title: Mohamed Salah - Egyptian king
items.summary: BBC Sport visits Egypt to discover what Mohamed Salah means to the people of the football-mad country, and how a small boy from humble beginnings became a national icon.

items.title: Rivals: Messi v Ronaldo - watch the trailer
items.summary: The story of how Lionel Messi v Cristiano Ronaldo became the rivalry that transformed football and defined a generation.

items.title: Aston Villa top scorer Hanson set to join Spurs
items.summary: Aston Villa forward Kirsty Hanson is set to join Tottenham following an impressive season in the Women's Super League.

items.title: Everton ‘lead transfer race for Middlesbrough star Hayden Hackney’ with Tottenham, Man Utd and others also circling
items.summary: EVERTON are leading the race for Middlesbrough midfielder Hayden Hackney, according to reports. However Manchester United and Tottenham are among a host of other clubs keen on the 23-year-old. items.title: World Cup latest: England can '100 per cent' win tournament, says Mainoo
The anatomy of a Golden Boot winner - and who could win it in 2026?
items.summary: A look at the common attributes of World Cup Golden Boot winners and the claims of the leading 2026 candidates examined.
